name: Coconut Rum & Pineapple Juice
title: Coconut Rum & Pineapple Juice | Coconut & Pineapple Cocktail | BACARDÍ Global
short_description: A tropical highball of BACARDÍ Coconut rum and pineapple juice served over ice.
marketing_description: The tropical combination of light BACARDÍ Coconut rum and fresh pineapple over ice demands your attention. It's a classy alternative to the creamy richness of a Piña Colada. Kick off your flip flops and relax with a BACARDÍ Coconut & Pineapple.

steps: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Pour in the BACARDÍ Coconut and pineapple juice.
Garnish with a few pineapple slices cut in triangles.

garnish: a few pineapple slices cut in triangles
raw_text_excerpt: How to make a COCONUT RUM & PINEAPPLE JUICE 50 ml BACARDÍ Coconut rum 150 ml pineapple juice ... 1 Chill Fill a highball glass with ice. 2 Pour Pour in the BACARDÍ Coconut and pineapple juice. 3 Mix Mix well. 4 Garnish Garnish with a few pineapple slices cut in triangles.
